items.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
items.raw_content: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.

items.title: Claude can now use your 1Password credentials for you
items.raw_content: 1Password has launched a new browser integration for Claude that allows the Anthropic chatbot to access stored security credentials like usernames and passwords. The 1Password for Claude feature means that users can authorize Claude to complete multi-step tasks like booking travel and managing online accounts on their behalf without having to manually input their login […]

items.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
items.raw_content: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.
items.summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

items.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
items.raw_content: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing […]

items.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
items.raw_content: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.
items.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.

items.title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
items.raw_content: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.
items.summary: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

items.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
items.raw_content: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.

items.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
items.raw_content: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

items.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
items.raw_content: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.
items.summary: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.

items.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
items.raw_content: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.
items.summary: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.

items.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
items.raw_content: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.
items.summary: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

items.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
items.raw_content: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. items.title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
items.raw_content: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have […]

items.title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
items.raw_content: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI that accused […]

items.title: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
items.raw_content: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be used with its coding platform, Codex. The device, a square-shaped block of buttons called Codex Micro, […]
items.summary: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit.

items.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
items.raw_content: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.
items.summary: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.

items.title: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
items.raw_content: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). items.title: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
items.raw_content: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports.
